title: limbarda crithmoides subsp. longifolia
intro: Limbarda crithmoides subsp. longifolia, also known as the Long-leaved Sea Spurry, is a plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Long-leaved Sea Spurry include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be found in some regions of the Mediterranean and North Africa.
